title: Add column using Automations / Workflows
excerpt: Add the ability to automatically add / duplicate columns + change their names using AI or a formula or duplicated name but instead of “(Copy)” add Month name

posts.author: AssafHamburger (Assaf Hamburger)
posts.cookedHtml: Add the ability to automatically add / duplicate columns + change their names using AI or a formula or duplicated name but instead of “(Copy)” add Month name
